bio: I'm a QA Tester with hands-on experience in manual testing, test case creation, and mobile application testing. I focus on identifying issues early and ensuring smooth user experiences across web and mobile platforms. I enjoy exploring testing tools, learning automation with Appium, and improving product reliability through structured testing processes. When I'm not testing applications, I like learning new automation techniques, exploring software tools, and improving my technical skills.
name: Dhruv Modi
tagline: Detail-oriented QA Tester passionate about improving product quality.
